# ui.components.contact { #app.ui.components.contact }

`ui.components.contact`

UI contact components for the BAM dashboard.

Provides reusable contact components including website, email, and issues.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [email](#app.ui.components.contact.email) | Generate an interface interaction gateway linking to default mail applications. |
| [report_issue](#app.ui.components.contact.report_issue) | Generate an issue-tracking shortcut pointing to repository management layers. |
| [website](#app.ui.components.contact.website) | Generate a dynamic navigation item linking to the core BAM project web portal. |
| [website_contact](#app.ui.components.contact.website_contact) | Generate a navigation layout button mapping to the official team directory page. |

### email { #app.ui.components.contact.email }

```python
ui.components.contact.email()
```

Generate an interface interaction gateway linking to default mail applications.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                 | Description                                                           |
|--------|----------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | shiny.ui.nav_control | An operational interface anchor using mailto address routing actions. |

### report_issue { #app.ui.components.contact.report_issue }

```python
ui.components.contact.report_issue()
```

Generate an issue-tracking shortcut pointing to repository management layers.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                 | Description                                                                    |
|--------|----------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | shiny.ui.nav_control | A link asset to log defects, structural feature requests, or application bugs. |

### website { #app.ui.components.contact.website }

```python
ui.components.contact.website()
```

Generate a dynamic navigation item linking to the core BAM project web portal.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                 | Description                                                                  |
|--------|----------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | shiny.ui.nav_control | A navigation controller containing an external anchor element configuration. |

### website_contact { #app.ui.components.contact.website_contact }

```python
ui.components.contact.website_contact()
```

Generate a navigation layout button mapping to the official team directory page.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                 | Description                                                                |
|--------|----------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | shiny.ui.nav_control | A web component mapping directly to external communication infrastructure. |
